title: ARCHITECT'S SIGNAL
subtitle: Mission: Reclamation via Open Science Infrastructure
name: Deonte Watts
mission: A public research identity hub for manuscripts, citation records, DOI releases, authority profiles, and open-science publishing workflows. Architecting justice engines through code and community-centered design.

workflow.label: AUTHOR
workflow.description: Write in manuscript/main.tex and keep bibliography in bibliography/references.bib.

workflow.label: RELEASE
workflow.description: Create a GitHub release with a semantic version tag such as v1.0.0.

workflow.label: ARCHIVE
workflow.description: Zenodo ingests the enabled GitHub release and creates a DOI.

workflow.label: SYNC
workflow.description: DataCite receives DOI metadata with ORCID creator metadata.

workflow.label: MIRROR
workflow.description: Mirror DOI links to Academia.edu, alphaXiv, Zotero, and profile pages.

workflow.label: PROMOTE
workflow.description: Cloudflare Pages rebuilds the public research hub from GitHub.
